scripts.dev: npm run verify:toolchain && npm run build:data-core && npm run build -w @bubu/contracts && npm run build -w @bubu/ai-runtime && npm run start -w @bubu/desktop
scripts.test: npm run build -w @bubu/contracts && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.lint: npm run version:check && npm run verify:repository && npm run verify:documentation && npm run verify:github && npm run verify:architecture && npm run verify:product-experience && npm run verify:product-metrics && npm run verify:release-readiness && npm run verify:legacy-retirement && npm run build -w @bubu/contracts && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build:data-core && npm run build -w @bubu/contracts && npm run build -w @bubu/ai-runtime && npm run build -w @bubu/desktop
scripts.smoke:data-core: npm run build:data-core && npm run build -w @bubu/contracts && node scripts/smoke-data-core.mjs
scripts.smoke:mcp: npm run build -w @bubu/contracts && npm run build -w @bubu/ai-runtime && node scripts/smoke-mcp.mjs
scripts.verify:performance: npm run build:data-core && npm run build -w @bubu/contracts && npm run benchmark:data-core
scripts.verify: npm run verify:toolchain && npm run verify:repository && npm run verify:architecture && npm run verify:dependencies && npm test && npm run test:data-core && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run smoke:data-core && npm run smoke:mcp && npm run smoke:desktop && npm run verify:performance
